title: filter result different on a index bit column with no-index bit column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1_no_idx(id INT, col_bit BINARY(2));
INSERT INTO t1_no_idx VALUES(1, X'3135'), (2, X'0F');
SELECT * FROM t1_no_idx WHERE col_bit = X'3135';
key_bug_features: filtering on indexed vs non-indexed bit column
